title: Prevent document viewer SSE rerenders and restore viewer font sizing
description:
Fix follow-up regressions in the Web UI document viewer.

## Background

After the modular renderer rollout, two more issues remain:
- The source-code viewer scrolls jerkily because the file viewer re-renders during unrelated live issue refreshes.
- CSV, TXT, and rich source viewers no longer match the original markdown viewer's code-view font sizing.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] The document viewer does not re-render its loaded document content during unrelated parent live-refresh updates when its own effective props have not changed.
- [ ] CSV, TXT, and rich source renderers use the same default content font size as the original markdown code-view baseline.
- [ ] Existing renderer/viewer tests cover the stabilized behavior and the configured web CI gate passes cleanly.

## Notes

This is a focused follow-up to the modular document rendering slice and the immediate viewer polish fix.
